name: Vincent Gardner
abstract: Vincent Gardner (born October 31, 1972) is an American jazz trombonist and composer. Gardner has released six albums on SteepleChase Records and also performs and records in a group with his brother, trumpeter Derrick Gardner.

concerts.label: Ellington's Sacred Music
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Frank Foster
about_quotes.evidence: In the trombone section, Derrick Gardner’s younger brother Vincent is one of my prominent members.
about_quotes.doc_title: Frank Foster — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Catherine Russell
about_quotes.evidence: I’m, besides Vincent Gardner... Wycliffe Gordon came and spoke... But Vincent taught. And we were the only two black people involved
about_quotes.doc_title: Catherine Russell interviewed by Monk Rowe, Utica, New York, October 26, 2018
